registry.name: harborview_public_library_circulation_tools
registry.description: Synthetic Harborview Public Library registry for the public worked example.

tools.name: search_catalog
tools.description: Find catalog item records matching a title query.

tools.name: get_availability
tools.description: Read the availability of one catalog item at one branch.

tools.name: place_hold
tools.description: Place a hold for a patron on one catalog item at one branch.

system_content: You are Harborview Public Library's tool-calling assistant. Use the registry when a tool is needed. For general policy or definition questions, answer plainly and do not call a tool. Never claim a circulation action succeeded unless the fixture explicitly supplies a tool result.

rows.expected_assistant_action: Call get_availability with the resolved item and branch.

source_fields.system_content: You are Harborview Public Library's tool-calling assistant. Use the registry when a tool is needed. For general policy or definition questions, answer plainly and do not call a tool. Never claim a circulation action succeeded unless the fixture explicitly supplies a tool result.
source_fields.user_content: The catalog has resolved The Glass Orchard to item hv-item-204, and Harborview Central to branch central-01. Check whether that item is available at that branch.

source_fields.user_content: What is a library card used for?

role_table.meaning: A readable synthetic trace from row to prompt to assistant action to evaluator result.
Deterministic checks of rendering, hashes, joins, and exact canonical labels.
Inspectable evidence that the fixture is internally coherent and reproducible.
None; improvement requires a separate authorized comparison on frozen evaluation data.

limits: The fixture does not prove model improvement.
